untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-market cross-correlation analysis ('correlated quantity shift detected in related market within 10-second window') and real-time microstructure tracking (quantity imbalance tracking across consecutive updates). Available indicators do not support cross-market relationships, sub-second temporal windows, or order book imbalance metrics. This requires specialized market microstructure data unavailable in standard OHLCV backtester.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: vol_ratio_20 approximates quantity imbalance threshold (1.5x baseline), returns approximates price dislocation formation (±15 bps ≈ ±0.0015). However, this is a severe simplification that cannot capture: (1) the 10-second cross-market confirmation window, (2) consecutive update consistency requirement, (3) actual order book quantity characteristics, or (4) early-stage dislocation detection. This signal is fundamentally incompatible with daily/hourly bar backtesting and requires tick-level or order-book-level data infrastructure.
